docket_entries.description: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = UNABLE TO FORWARD/FOR REVIEW
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LANG, TATIANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CYBROWSKI, SEAN $1,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,530.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF LANG, TATIANA AS TO DEFENDANT CYBROWSKI, SEAN
ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850. REQUEST GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. (JUDGMENT ENTERED ON:APRIL 29, 2015).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CYBROWSKI, SEAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,400.00 FILED BY LANG, TATIANA AS TO DEFENDANT CYBROWSKI, SEAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 100.00 - SERVED MAR-31-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CYBROWSKI, SEAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-29-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-29-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CYBROWSKI, SEAN
DECLARATION OF SEAN CYBROWSKI RE: ADDRESS UPDATE FILED BY DEFENDANT CYBROWSKI, SEAN
